headline: After a 5-year wait, Knoxville man's '69 Mustang came back in ruins. "He stripped it." How to avoid a similar situation
summary: Conflicting narratives are at play, with the man and repair man blaming each other for the less-than-ideal outcome.

headline: Ford Shareholder Activism Puts Governance And DEI Oversight In Focus
summary: Shareholder groups are putting forward multiple governance proposals at Ford Motor (NYSE:F) ahead of the 2026 annual meeting. Key items include calls for equal voting rights under a one share, one vote structure and disclosure of voting results by share class. Investors are also asking for more oversight and reporting on returns from Ford's diversity, equity, and inclusion programs. Ford's board recommends voting against these proposals, setting up a potential clash between management and...

headline: How much to invest in Ford stock for $1,000 in 2026 dividends
